About Elevationary Agents

Mission: Establish a low-cost, high-ownership revenue engine ("Lean Stack").

Elevationary Agents is the specialized AI service catalog and agent interface for Elevationary. We provide machine-readable protocols and AI-optimized services to facilitate agent-to-agent commerce and autonomous integration.

What We Do

  • Consulting — Fixed-duration AI strategy sessions (15–90 min) for executives and functional leaders ready to move from AI hype to measurable outcomes.
  • Insights & Newsletter — Subscription-based intelligence briefings: free "3-2-1" summaries for broad reach, paid "Full Story" deep-dives for practitioners.
  • Agent Protocols — Machine-readable service manifests (ACP/UCP) enabling autonomous AI agents to discover, evaluate, and transact with Elevationary services without human intermediation.

Stack: Eleventy · Cloudflare Pages/Workers/D1 · Stripe · Postmark — zero proprietary lock-in, maximum ownership.

Founder

Founded by James Szmak.

James is the CEO of Elevationary, leading the charge in agentic AI adoption and enterprise transformation.

Contact: james.szmak@elevationary.com
